data.title: Atlanta Hawks partner with ManageEngine to enhance IT operations and elevate fan experience at State Farm Arena.
data.description: A collaboration between ManageEngine, a division of Zoho Corp., and the Atlanta Hawks of State Farm Arena in Austin, Texas, has been established to boost the team's IT operations. This partnership aims to improve the technology infrastructure supporting the acclaimed downtown Atlanta venue. ManageEngine's comprehensive platform will facilitate the Hawks' IT ecosystem, emphasizing visibility, automation, and proactive decision-making. This collaboration will enhance the entire IT operations of the Hawks and State Farm Arena.

data.title: TRX may hit $0.32-$0.35 by Feb 2026, with a 20% increase from current $0.30, supported by MACD and RSI.
data.description: Experts forecasting TRON's price anticipate a potential increase of 20%, pushing it into the $0.32 to $0.35 range. TRX is currently challenging the crucial $0.30 resistance level amidst bullish MACD signals and a neutral RSI placement.

data.title: Larridin appoints SaaS leader Nick Mehta to Board of Directors, bringing over a decade of industry experience.
data.description: In San Francisco, Larridin, an AI measurement and scaling platform, made an announcement today regarding the appointment of Nick Mehta to its Board of Directors. Mehta, the former CEO of Gainsight during the period of 2013 to 2025, is recognized as a key figure in the customer success sector and an influential advocate for data-backed growth within enterprise software firms. Boasting more than ten years of expertise in revolutionizing customer interactions and enhancing retention rates for B2B SaaS enterprises, Mehta’s insights are expected to play a crucial role in shaping Larridin’s strategies.

data.title: Litecoin's current price at $76.49 is expected to rise to $87-95 by February. $82 support level critical for breakout.
data.description: The current trading price of Litecoin is $76.49, with market analysts predicting a potential recovery to a range of $87 to $95 in the next four weeks. The crucial support level to watch is at $82, and the momentum signal on the MACD indicator will be instrumental in confirming a bullish breakout.

data.title: ATOM eyes $2.67 resistance with RSI at 64.09. Potential breakout to $2.75-$2.80 range if momentum holds.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ATOM is nearing a crucial $2.67 resistance level, accompanied by a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 64.09. Analysts predict a potential surge towards the $2.75-$2.80 range if bullish momentum continues above the current price levels.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) price expected to hit $670-720 by mid-Feb 2026. Weekly target: $635-650. Bullish breakout at $635.70, support at $592.50.
data.description: Predictions for BCH pricing indicate a short-term target between $635 and $650 within the upcoming week. The medium-term forecast suggests a range of $670 to $720 over the next month. The bullish breakout level is anticipated to be $635.70, while critical support is expected at $592.50. These figures suggest potential fluctuations in BCH value in the near future.

data.title: UNI price is projected to reach $5.85-$6.29 by end of January 2026. Short-term target: $5.85. Bullish breakout at $6.29.
data.description: Predictions for the price of UNI suggest a short-term target of $5.85 within one week. In the medium term, a forecast ranging from $5.40 to $6.29 is projected over one month. A bullish breakout level is identified at $6.29, marked by the upper Bollinger Band.

data.title: Chainlink aims for $15.50 by February amid neutral RSI at $13.31; resistance at $13.59. Forecasted rally to $15.50-$16.00.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Chainlink is currently trading at $13.31, showing a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and facing a significant resistance level at $13.59. Technical analysis indicates a possible uptrend to the $15.50-$16.00 range if there is a bullish momentum in the market.

data.title: AVAX Price set to reach $16.50 by February with current price at $13.79. Mixed signals pose uncertainty for bulls.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Avalanche is currently trading at $13.79, and analysts predict it could reach between $15.50 and $16.50 in the next few weeks. Despite a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 53.98, the bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum introduces uncertainty for AVAX supporters.

data.title: Polkadot's price predicted to hit $2.26, with short-term target range of $2.18-$2.26 and medium-term forecast of $2.00-$2.30. Bullish breakout level at $2.34.
data.description: Summary of DOT Price Prediction: In the short term (1 week), the target price for DOT is expected to be within the range of $2.18 to $2.26. Looking ahead to the medium term (1 month), the forecast indicates a range between $2.00 and $2.30. For a bullish breakout scenario, the critical level to watch is $2.34, aligning with the Upper Bollinger Band.

data.title: Kratos opens 55,000 sq ft hypersonic system facility in Princess Anne, Maryland, sixth new facility in a year.
data.description: Kratos showcases dedication to expanding the U.S. Defense Industrial Base by revealing its sixth new facility within a year. This strategic move emphasizes Kratos' investment in bolstering defense capabilities and infrastructure, highlighting a commitment to growth and innovation within the sector. This expansion signifies a significant milestone in Kratos' ongoing efforts to strengthen the defense industry, underlining its rapid pace of development and sustained progress.

data.title: Firefly Aerospace upgrades Alpha rocket for improved reliability and global launches.Enhancements aim to support responsive launches worldwide.
data.description: The Block II upgrade has been developed with the aim of enhancing reliability and expanding Alpha's capacity to facilitate responsive launches worldwide. This upgrade is set to significantly boost Alpha's capabilities, enabling it to support a greater number of launches globally while ensuring increased reliability in its operations. The upgrades are expected to improve the efficiency and performance of Alpha, further solidifying its position as a leading player in the space launch industry.
DIMON SAYS RISING TIDE LIFTING ALL BOATS NOW BUT THAT COULD STOP

data.title: Monero hits record high at $687 amid stricter crypto monitoring, fueling demand for privacy-focused assets.
data.description: Increasing regulatory requirements for Know Your Customer (KYC) processes and heightened scrutiny within the digital economy have resulted in a surge in investor interest for privacy-focused digital assets such as Monero. As a result, there has been a notable uptick in demand for cryptocurrencies like Monero that offer enhanced privacy features, indicating a growing preference for anonymity among investors.

data.title: MIRATECH enhances catalyst capacity in the U.S. with Advanced Catalyst Systems acquisition, targeting global emissions demand.
data.description: A recent strategic acquisition has bolstered MIRATECH's manufacturing capabilities and innovation efforts in response to the increasing global demand for emissions solutions. This move, announced in Tulsa, Oklahoma on January 13, 2026, is set to enhance the company's position as a key player in the industry. This signals an important step towards meeting the growing need for emissions and acoustic control solutions for stationary engines worldwide.

data.title: Kuaishou Technology reports a Kling AI annualized revenue run rate of USD240 million in December 2025.
data.description: In Hong Kong on January 13, 2026, Kuaishou Technology, a prominent content community and social platform, revealed the launch of its cutting-edge video generation software. The company, listed on the HKD Counter Stock Exchange as 01024 and on the RMB Counter Stock Exchange as 81024, introduced this innovative tool, showcasing its position as a leader in the global tech industry.

data.title: Biotech company SystImmune's affiliate Biokin to present at J.P. Morgan's 44th Annual Healthcare Conference.
data.description: SystImmune Inc., a biotechnology company headquartered in Redmond, Washington, disclosed today that its affiliate, Sichuan Biokin Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., is scheduled to participate in the J.P. Morgan's 44th Annual Healthcare Conference on January __, 2026. The conference is a prominent event in the healthcare industry, attracting key stakeholders and investors. SystImmune is known for its innovative approach to developing therapies and has been gaining traction in the clinical-stage. Sichuan Biokin's presentation at the conference signifies an opportunity to showcase its advancements and potential collaborations. This participation reflects the significant role both companies play in the biotechnology sector and underscores their commitment to exploring new opportunities.

data.title: Valmet Oyj to release Financial Statements Review 2025 on February 6, 2026 at 9:00 a.m. Finnish Time.
data.description: Valmet Oyj announced their upcoming Financial Statements Review for 2025 to be released on Friday, February 6, 2026, around 9:00 a.m. Finnish Time. This press release was made on January 13, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. EET in ESPOO, Finland. The review will be available in English for the stock exchange release.
